home.heroTitle: The platform that runs your journey end to end
home.heroSubtitle: One system for your organization, mobile tools for employees and pilgrims—aligned, secure, and ready to scale.
home.servicesLead: From workforce coordination to pilgrim experience—structured workflows you can trust.
home.service1Desc: Shifts, locations, supervisors, and attendance in one operational layer.
home.service2Desc: Roles, permissions, and HR workflows tailored to your organization.
home.service3Desc: Targeted announcements, schedules, and reminders across web and mobile.
home.service4Desc: Dashboards for leadership with clear visibility into activity.
home.productsLead: Web for operations—mobile apps for people in the field and on the journey.
home.productWebDesc: The core platform for admins, supervisors, HR, and service centers—your control tower.
home.productEmployeeDesc: For staff: attendance, schedules, updates, and day-to-day tasks on the go.
home.productPilgrimDesc: For pilgrims: guidance, information, and support throughout the journey.
home.aboutLead: Kamel brings teams, pilgrims, and operators onto one coherent stack.
home.aboutBody:
We believe the Hajj experience should be smooth, clear, and free from operational complexity, focusing on clarity, reliability, and security to enable institutions to deliver exceptional journeys.

The system is named "Kamel" in memory of the late Kamel Samanoudi, whose values inspired the idea of building a platform that reflects integration and excellence in serving the Guests of Allah.
home.visionQuote: We strive to make the Hajj and Umrah experience more transparent, human-centered, and efficient for all participants.
home.clientsLead: Organizations that trust Kamel for critical operations. (Logos placeholders—swap with real brands.)
home.footerTagline: Built for modern Hajj & Umrah operations.
home.footerLegalNote: Privacy & terms: add your policies when ready.

notifications.webPushHint: Get alerts when the app is closed or in the background. On iPhone, add Kamel to your Home Screen first (Safari 16.4+). Requires HTTPS in production.
notifications.webPushDisable: Turn off push on this device
notifications.webPushNotSupported: This browser does not support push notifications.
notifications.webPushServerOff: Push is not enabled on the server yet (admin must set VAPID keys).
notifications.webPushDenied: Permission was blocked. Allow notifications in your browser settings.

auth.loginIntro: Sign in to access your portal.
auth.loginError: Sign in failed. Check your credentials.

signUp.noShiftsForLocation: No shifts are linked to this location yet. Ask your administrator, or use a shift set for “all locations”.
signUp.noSupervisorsForLocation: No supervisors are assigned to this location yet. You can leave this empty or contact HR.
signUp.serviceCenterSelectHint: Choose the center you belong to (ID is assigned by the system administrator).
signUp.serviceCenterIntro: Create your account to access the service center portal.
signUp.employeeIntro: Create your account to join your organization as an employee.
signUp.noCentersYet: Registration is not available yet: no service centers have been created. Please contact the administrator.
signUp.error: Registration failed. Check your data or contact admin.
signUp.successPending: Account created. HR must approve your registration before you can sign in.

hrPending.title: Pending sign-ups
hrPending.intro: Approve new employee and service-center accounts and assign their role. Default role is read-only until you choose otherwise.
hrPending.approvedOk: User approved — they can sign in now.
hrPending.badgeViewOnly: View only — ask HR Supervisor or Manager

supervisorPending.title: Pending team sign-ups
supervisorPending.intro: Only employees who chose you as supervisor when registering are listed here—not all company users. Approve to activate their account and assign a role.
supervisorPending.empty: No pending sign-ups for your team.
supervisorPending.approvedOk: Approved — they can sign in now.

forbidden.message: You do not have permission to access this page.

pwa.updateMessage: A new version of the app is available. Refresh to update.
pwa.iosInstallTitle: Add Kamel to your home screen
pwa.iosInstallIntro: On iPhone and iPad, install via Safari using Add to Home Screen:
pwa.iosStep1: Tap the Share button in the toolbar (square with an arrow).
pwa.iosStep2: Scroll and tap Add to Home Screen.

portal.receptionDashboardIntro: This is a Reception test page. Reception features will be added later.
portal.receptionTestViewOk: OK: you can view this part.
portal.receptionTestManageOk: OK: you can perform the action.
portal.receptionTestManageDenied: Denied: this action is for Supervisor or EmpManage only.
portal.receptionServiceCentersSubtitle: Live view of all service centers: pilgrims, arrivals, and nationalities.
portal.receptionScNoAllocatedPilgrims: No allocated pilgrims to chart yet.
portal.receptionScChartSubtitle: Allocated vs arrived across all centers
portal.receptionScDrawerHint: Users linked to this service center in the system.
portal.receptionScNoUsers: No users assigned to this center
portal.receptionNatSubtitle: Summary and per-nationality arrivals across all service centers (designed for many nationalities).
portal.supervisorAttendanceHint: View only. Shows check-in and check-out for employees who report to you.
portal.hrDashboardIntro: This dashboard is dedicated to HR to manage users and access.

test.title: Test Permission and Role
test.testRolesHint: Click a button to see if your role allows the action.
test.adminSuccess: You have Admin role — action allowed.
test.adminDenied: This action is for Admin role only.
test.supervisorSuccess: You have Supervisor/Admin role — action allowed.
test.supervisorDenied: This action is for Supervisor or Admin only.
test.employeeSuccess: You have a valid role — action allowed.

superadmin.title: Super Admin
superadmin.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
superadmin.shiftWorkLocationHint: If set, this shift is offered only when that location is chosen at sign-up. Leave empty for all locations.
superadmin.name: Name
superadmin.permissionsStep1: Step 1: Create a permission (name and module/page).
superadmin.permissionsStep2: Step 2: Assign the permission to a group.
superadmin.permissionsStep3: Step 3: Assign users to the group.
superadmin.scCenterCodeHint: Users see this code when they sign up. It must be unique.
superadmin.scCapacityExceeded: Total pilgrims assigned across nationalities ({{allocated}}) is higher than this center's maximum capacity ({{max}}). Lower the nationality totals or increase max capacity.
superadmin.scCapacitySumHint: The sum of pilgrims in all nationality rows below cannot exceed this value.
superadmin.scDeleteCenterConfirm: Delete this service center? Users will be unassigned from this center.
superadmin.scNatHintMaxHere: Max you can assign at this center
superadmin.scNatHintNoCap: No national cap (set total on nationality to enforce)
superadmin.scDuplicateNationalityRow: This nationality is already used in another row.
superadmin.scArrivingExceedsAllocatedRow: Arriving cannot be greater than allocated for this row.
superadmin.scAllocatedExceedsNationalTotal: For this nationality you can assign at most {{max}} at this center (national total minus other centers).
superadmin.scNationalityAllocationExceededMsg: {{name}}: other centers already have {{others}} allocated; you entered {{requested}} but the national total is only {{total}}.
superadmin.natArrivingExceedsTotalField: Total arriving cannot be greater than total pilgrims.
superadmin.natTotalBelowAllocatedField: Total pilgrims cannot be less than {{allocated}} (already allocated across service centers).
superadmin.scAssignHint: The user will be set to type Service Center and linked to this center. They can use the Service Center portal.
superadmin.scUnassignConfirm: Remove this user from the service center?
superadmin.scNoUsersInCenter: No users assigned to this center
superadmin.scNatCodeHint: Optional internal reference (number or text). Must stay unique if set.
superadmin.scNatFlagCodeHint: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 (SA) or common alpha-3 (SAU) for flag images in Reception → Nationalities. Optional.
superadmin.scDeleteNatConfirm: Delete this nationality? Links from service centers will be removed.
superadmin.natTotalsHint: Total pilgrims: you can set a national target. Total arriving is updated automatically from all service centers (sum of “arriving” per center). You can re-run “Recalculate” if needed.
superadmin.natSyncArrivingSuccess: Nationality arriving totals updated from service centers
superadmin.natAllocatedExceedsTotal: Sum allocated in centers ({{allocated}}) is greater than national total ({{total}}).
superadmin.natCentersSupportingHint: Allocated = pilgrims assigned to this center for this nationality. Arriving = already arrived. Waiting = allocated minus arriving (e.g. 100 − 80 = 20).
superadmin.natNoCentersForNationality: No service center is linked to this nationality yet.
superadmin.natFooterSums: Totals across centers: allocated {{alloc}}, arriving {{arr}}, waiting {{wait}}.
